channel.title: +Articles on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Muslim-borrowing
item.description: Source: TW Arfa and her ilk today are seething over the image of Dhanvantari, the God of Ayurveda. But once upon a Time her Arab Masters had copied their knowledge of medicine from Sushruta, Charaka etc who credited all their work to the same Dhanvantari. 1. Rabban Al Tabari: The first encyclopaedia of medicine in Arabic was Rabban Al Tabari’s Firdous Al Hikmah. His work was highly influenced by Indian physicians such as Sushruta & Charaka.

item.title: nikhil - vaccination exemption request
item.description: Source: TW Covid-19 booster religious exemption request for the University of Michigan 23 January 2022 Níkhila Sū́rya Dvibhā́ṣya The following was my (successful) request for a religious exemption from the Covid-19 booster mandated by the University of Michigan for all students. This page contains the prompt that I was required to answer, followed by my response; the rest of this document, slightly modified from the original, consists of an essay with scriptural citations that I wrote and attached to my response.
